data.name: Plastic Lust
data.detailed_description:
An erotic visual novel with full voice acting. Fall in love with Mujina, a doll-girl who loves attaching new, kinky parts to herself!

A beautiful doll-girl with a mysterious past. She came to Dane for repairs, but now she doesn't want to leave. Could this be the start of a lustful romance?

Voiced by Opalu.

A dollmaker living in the woods. He doesn't like people much... but ever since Mujina showed up, he's been feeling things he's never felt before. Will she help him break out of his shell?

Voiced by Interstellar Incubus.

  • ~15,000 words of lustful fun.

  • ~30 erotic illustrations.

  • Full voice-acting.

  • NSFW sound effects (toggleable).

data.short_description: A futa x male visual novel about a cute doll girl who gets addicted to the pleasures of her new attachments. Features full voice acting!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista or higher.
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista or higher.
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
